arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer confirmed as £22m Andy Robertson replacement 'identified'
arts.sum: Liverpool may not have signed anyone in the January transfer window but speculation continues over who they may sign in the summer

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Mathys Tel failure explained as two deals go through after transfer deadline
arts.sum: Late efforts from Manchester United to add to the signings of Patrick Dorgu and Ayden Heaven ended up failing to bear fruit, leaving Ruben Amorim with limited options

arts.ttl: Arsenal show Liverpool clear area of improvement as Premier League title race intensifies
arts.sum: Liverpool lag behind Arsenal in set-piece prowess as the two battle for the Premier League title

arts.ttl: Liverpool told they only need to worry about ONE team in title race - and it's not Arsenal
arts.sum: Liverpool currently sit top of the Premier League, with a six-point lead over closest challengers Arsenal, but it is not the Gunners the Reds need to fear heading into the run-in

arts.ttl: Liverpool will give Arsenal £50m transfer green light after transformation complete
arts.sum: Ryan Gravenberch is excelling at number six for Liverpool this season with the frustration at missing out on Martin Zubimendi now a distant memory

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer chief blames new UEFA format for club's slow transfer window - and claims Spurs 'were ready' to make signings on January 1st
arts.sum: During the January window, the north London side made three signings in the form of Antonin Kinsky, Kevin Danso and Mathys Tel - who joined the club on deadline day.

arts.ttl: Daniel Levy approach could be priming Tottenham for a sale
arts.sum: While Spurs have been growing off the pitch their rivals have been spending, and Arsenal’s gamble to invest in some big players in recent seasons has seen the club return to the Champions League, something that will book them more than £90million by the time the knockout phase starts when all things, such as matchday income, are accounted for. Talk of ENIC and Spurs chairman Daniel Levy being willing to listen to offers for the club has swirled around for a couple of years, with reports of a £3.1billion bid for the club from American investment firm MSP Sports Capital having come to nothing, while in recent months talk of a potential sale or minority stake purchase from the Middle East, with Amanda Staveley leading on it, has also been a hot topic.

arts.ttl: Tottenham star Radu Dragusin breaks silence after season-ending injury with emotional statement
arts.sum: Football doesn’t just teach you how to win—it teaches you how to fight when things get tough. "I want to thank you all for your messages of support after my injury—those mean a lot and give me even more motivation.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher names Liverpool star he 'isn't the biggest fan of' despite Arne Slot praise
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has admitted he is not the "biggest fan" of a Liverpool player that Reds boss Arne Slot believes "doesn't always get the credits" the he deserves

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Djed Spence out to silence Mohamed Salah again and then earn England call-up
arts.sum: The full-back kept the Liverpool star quiet in the Carabao Cup semi-final first leg
